name: Chocolate Crinkle Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt in a medium bowl.
2. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, cream together the brown sugar and butter or shortening until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in the egg and corn syrup until well combined.
5. Gradually mix in the dry ingredients until just incorporated.
6. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
7. Dip half of each ball into water, then roll in granulated sugar.
8. Place the sugar-coated cookies on ungreased baking sheets.
9. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes.
10. Remove from the baking sheets immediately.
Makes about 3 and a half dozen.
